svg.text: Consumes events (demand.signal, stock.low, shipment.exception, po.due, supplier.reply) → routes to specialist agents → self-verifies before any write or commitment → commits or queues for approval → writes agent_runs + audit_log

svg.text: SELF-VERIFICATION JUDGE (before every write — and especially every PO & supplier action)
“Is this grounded in real signals? Within limits? An approved supplier? A duplicate PO?” → PASS: commit / queue approval · FAIL: regenerate · then escalate — no commitment is ever autonomous

svg.text: ① MCP-first — every capability is a tool; the same tools power web, Excel, Slack & email.
② Anticipate, don't react — demand sensing flags risk before the stockout happens.
③ Grounded — forecasts tie to real signals; no hallucinated numbers.
④ Approval on every commitment — POs & supplier actions are never autonomous.
⑤ Idempotent & controlled — idempotency keys prevent duplicate orders; approved-vendor limits.
⑥ Everything audited — and supply1 is the ops engine behind retail1, manufacture1 & energy1.
